arts.ttl: David Moyes sends Jarrad Branthwaite transfer warning as Everton 'hold all the cards'
arts.sum: Everton rejected a £50million offer from Manchester United for Jarrad Branthwaite last summer and David Moyes says the England centre-half is still under contract for three years

arts.ttl: Liverpool: Ola Aina reacts as Mohamed Salah 'turns down £500m Saudi move' to sign new contract
arts.sum: Salah has moved to end all speculation regarding his future by signing a new deal at Anfield until the summer of 2027

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest team news and predicted XI to face Everton as Nuno Espirito Santo has decision to make
Monte-Carlo Masters: Carlos Alcaraz through to semi-finals after Arthur Fils scare
arts.sum: Carlos Alcaraz huffed and puffed into the Monte-Carlo Masters semi-finals with a 4-6 7-5 6-3 victory over wasteful local favourite Arthur Fils. Fils wasted seven break points, however, in the second set, and Alcaraz levelled the tie with a superb lob to steal Fils' serve in the 12th game.

arts.ttl: 'I was not prepared for that' - Everton's Doucoure on racist abuse
arts.sum: Everton midfielder Abdoulaye Doucoure opens up about the racist abuse he suffered after February's Merseyside derby, as he takes part in the Premier League's No Room For Racism scheme.

arts.ttl: Report: Nottingham Forest ready to pull the trigger to beat FC Porto to £8.7m transfer
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest will be in the market for a striker this summer. Everton showed interest in Taiwo Awoniyi in January, and while a deal couldn’t...

arts.ttl: Carlos Alcaraz: World number one has 'missed clay' after reaching semi-finals with win over Arthur Fils
arts.sum: World number three Alcaraz saved three break points in the 11th game of the second set in a thrilling tussle with 20-year-old Fils. Alcaraz managed to draw level at 4-4, only for Fils to break once more and then hold serve to take the set as he saved two break points.

arts.ttl: Forest want to create new history - Elanga
arts.sum: Dion Dublin speaks with winger Anthony Elanga to discuss Nottingham Forest boss Nuno Espirito Santo and how he has got them "chasing greatness" this season.

arts.ttl: David Moyes tips Nottingham Forest boss Nuno Espirito Santo for major honour
arts.sum: It goes against who usually wins it...

arts.ttl: Team News: Nottingham Forest vs. Everton injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Nottingham Forest and Everton.
